subject: A humanoid figure with long pink hair in a traditional Japanese kimono, standing in a dynamic pose with one arm raised, set against a night sky with a large full moon and falling maple leaves
description: A figure with distinctively long pink hair is dressed in a red and white traditional Japanese kimono or festival robe. She stands in a graceful raised-arm pose, framed by autumn maple leaves in red and orange falling across the composition. A large golden full moon dominates the upper right of the background, set against a deep blue-purple night sky. The art style is cel-shaded anime with clean outlines and vivid saturated color.
foreground: Pink-haired figure in red and white kimono with raised arm, maple leaves
background: Full moon against deep night sky, scattered maple leaves
emotion: graceful, performative — figure in mid-movement with composed expression
